TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cihalaay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 35% kyan ku 41 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 65% kyan ku 75 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 34%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihalaay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cihalaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihalaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihalaay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cihalaay hya' ga Talampo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cihalaay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cihalaay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa talampo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cihalaay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 35% kyan ku 41 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 65% kyan ku 75 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 34%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihalaay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cihalaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihalaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihalaay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cihalaay hya' ga Talampo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cihalaay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cihalaay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ħjaʔ ɣa talampo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiħalaaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
